commands.name: file
commands.description: Change a single file to file scoped namespace.

options.name: --replace
options.description: Replace file with new version.  !!WARNING: Cannot be undone.

options.name: --skip-designer
options.description: Skip files that end in designer.cs.

commands.name: folder
commands.description: Change a whole folder to file scoped namespace.

options.name: --replace
options.description: Replace file with new version.  !!WARNING: Cannot be undone.

options.name: --skip-designer
options.description: Skip files that end in designer.cs.

options.name: --replace
options.description: Replace file with new version.  !!WARNING: Cannot be undone.
